mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decision_runs ( decision_id, started_at, completed_at, inst_id, inst_type, base_ccy, quote_ccy, td_mode, trigger_type, trigger_reason, trigger_details_json, action, decision_reason, buy_quote_amount, sell_base_amount, last_price, available_base, available_quote, execution_status, skip_reason, error ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{instId}, #{instType}, #{baseCcy}, #{quoteCcy}, #{tdMode}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerReason}, #{triggerDetailsJson}, #{action}, #{decisionReason}, #{buyQuoteAmount}, #{sellBaseAmount}, #{lastPrice}, #{availableBase}, #{availableQuote}, #{executionStatus}, #{skipReason}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE completed_at = VALUES(completed_at), action = VALUES(action), decision_reason = VALUES(decision_reason), buy_quote_amount = VALUES(buy_quote_amount), sell_base_amount = VALUES(sell_base_amount), last_price = VALUES(last_price), available_base = VALUES(available_base), available_quote = VALUES(available_quote), execution_status = VALUES(execution_status), skip_reason = VALUES(skip_reason), error = VALUES(error)

INSERT INTO ai_requests ( decision_id, prompt_text, ai_parameters_json ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{promptText}, #{aiParametersJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE prompt_text = VALUES(prompt_text), ai_parameters_json = VALUES(ai_parameters_json)

INSERT INTO ai_responses ( decision_id, received_at, raw_response, parsed_action, parsed_reason, parsed_buy_quote_amount, parsed_sell_base_amount ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{receivedAt}, #{rawResponse}, #{parsedAction}, #{parsedReason}, #{parsedBuyQuoteAmount}, #{parsedSellBaseAmount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE received_at = VALUES(received_at), raw_response = VALUES(raw_response), parsed_action = VALUES(parsed_action), parsed_reason = VALUES(parsed_reason), parsed_buy_quote_amount = VALUES(parsed_buy_quote_amount), parsed_sell_base_amount = VALUES(parsed_sell_base_amount)

INSERT INTO order_executions ( decision_id, inst_id, side, td_mode, order_type, target_currency, order_size, order_id, client_order_id, execution_status, skip_reason, filled_base_amount, average_fill_price, fee, fee_ccy, error ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{instId}, #{side}, #{tdMode}, #{orderType}, #{targetCurrency}, #{orderSize}, #{orderId}, #{clientOrderId}, #{executionStatus}, #{skipReason}, #{filledBaseAmount}, #{averageFillPrice}, #{fee}, #{feeCcy}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_size = VALUES(order_size), order_id = VALUES(order_id), client_order_id = VALUES(client_order_id), execution_status = VALUES(execution_status), skip_reason = VALUES(skip_reason), filled_base_amount = VALUES(filled_base_amount), average_fill_price = VALUES(average_fill_price), fee = VALUES(fee), fee_ccy = VALUES(fee_ccy), error = VALUES(error)
